lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.chinese: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

lines.english: Does the man get his umbrella back?
lines.chinese: 这位男士找回他的伞了吗？
lines.raw: Does the man get his umbrella back? | 这位男士找回他的伞了吗？

lines.english: My coat and my umbrella please.
lines.chinese: 请把我的大衣和雨伞给我。
lines.raw: My coat and my umbrella please. | 请把我的大衣和雨伞给我。
Here is my ticket. | 这是我的票。
Thank you sir. | 谢谢您，先生。

lines.english: Here's your umbrella and your coat.
lines.raw: Here's your umbrella and your coat. | 这是您的伞和大衣。
This is not my umbrella. | 这不是我的伞。
Is this your umbrella? | 这是您的伞吗？
No it isn't. | 不，它不是。
Is this it? | 是这把吗？
Yes it is. | 是的，就是它。
Thank you very much. | 非常感谢。
